violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Teflon skillets have scratches and need disposed of.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Shelves in 2 door upright cooler are rusty.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean soda and tea dispensers.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside line coolers including door seals.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving, utility cart, fronts/sides/handles of all warmers and coolers and grills.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Clean the clean dish storage rack.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. -Clean both restrooms.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor tiles in kitchen are cracked.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceiling are very dirty in prep and dish wash area. -Need to clean floor drains thoroughly.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Repair and paint low shelving below register.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside all line coolers and warmers. -Clean rice container in back area.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Dishes were not cleaned thoroughly.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in entire facility need to be thoroughly cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
